# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Payment gateway API - Stripe"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
    - "checkout-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Email delivery service - SendGrid"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Google Maps API for geolocation services"
spec:
  hosts:
    - maps.googleapis.com
    - maps.google.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "location-service"
    - "delivery-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth0-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Auth0 identity provider"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.auth0.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "auth-service"
    - "user-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: cloud-storage
  annotations:
    description: "AWS S3 bucket access for file storage"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
    - "*.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com"
    - "*.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Primary PostgreSQL database hosted on AWS RDS"
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
    - "user-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Read replica PostgreSQL database on AWS RDS"
spec:
  hosts:
    - readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "ElastiCache Redis cluster for caching and sessions"
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-primary.abc123.ng.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 6379
      name: tcp-redis
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 6380
      name: tcp-redis-tls
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-atlas
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "MongoDB Atlas cluster for document storage"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.mongodb.net"
  addresses: []
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 27017
      name: tcp-mongo
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "catalog-service"
    - "content-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Elastic Cloud Elasticsearch for search and logging"
spec:
  hosts:
    - my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 9243
      name: https-elastic
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-messaging
  annotations:
    description: "Confluent Cloud Kafka cluster"
spec:
  hosts:
    - pkc-abc123.us-east-1.aws.confluent.cloud
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 9092
      name: tcp-kafka
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 9093
      name: tcp-kafka-tls
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "*"
---
# ============================================================
# VirtualService configurations for external traffic routing
# ============================================================
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
    - "checkout-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.stripe.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
  # HTTP routing is defined for observability if TLS origination
  # is handled by an egress gateway
  http:
    - timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 4s
        retryOn: "connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
      fault: {}
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - api.sendgrid.com
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
  http:
    - timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 6s
        retryOn: "connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - maps.googleapis.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "location-service"
    - "delivery-service"
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /maps/api/geocode
        - uri:
            prefix: /maps/api/directions
      timeout: 8s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: "connect-failure,refused-stream,503,504"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /maps/api/place
      timeout: 5s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 2s
        retryOn: "connect-failure,503"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443
    # Default route for any other Maps API endpoints
    - timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 4s
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
    - "user-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432
          weight: 100
      # TCP keepalive and connection timeout settings
---

kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432
          weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-redis-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-primary.abc123.ng.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "*"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 6379
      route:
        - destination:
            host: redis-primary.abc123.ng.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 6379
    - match:
        - port: 6380
      route:
        - destination:
            host: redis-primary.abc123.ng.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 6380
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
  tls:
    - match:
        - port: 9243
          sniHosts:
            - my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
      route:
        - destination:
            host: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
            port:
              number: 9243
  http:
    - match:
        - headers:
            x-service-name:
              exact: search-service
      timeout: 5s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 2s
        retryOn: "connect-failure,503"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
            port:
              number: 9243
    - match:
        - headers:
            x-service-name:
              exact: logging-service
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: "connect-failure,503,429"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
            port:
              number: 9243
    - timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 4s
      route:
        - destination:
            host: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
            port:
              number: 9243
---
# ============================================================
# DestinationRule for external services (connection pooling, TLS)
# ============================================================
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.stripe.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.stripe.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
          probes: 10
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.sendgrid.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.sendgrid.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: maps.googleapis.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: maps.googleapis.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 3s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: UPGRADE
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 200
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 5
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveGatewayErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 120s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 5
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveGatewayErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-redis-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: redis-primary.abc123.ng.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 3s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 120s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveGatewayErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
  portLevelSettings:
    - port:
        number: 6380
      tls:
        mode: SIMPLE
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 150
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 600s
          interval: 60s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: UPGRADE
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
# ============================================================
# Egress Gateway for controlled external access
# ============================================================
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: egress-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  selector:
    istio: egressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: tls-stripe
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - api.stripe.com
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: tls-sendgrid
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - api.sendgrid.com
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: tls-google-maps
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - maps.googleapis.com
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: tls-elasticsearch
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 5432
        name: tcp-postgres-primary
        protocol: TCP
      hosts:
        - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
    - port:
        number: 5432
        name: tcp-postgres-readonly
        protocol: TCP
      hosts:
        - readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
    - port:
        number: 6379
        name: tcp-redis
        protocol: TCP
      hosts:
        - redis-primary.abc123.ng.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
---
# ============================================================
# Sidecar configuration to limit egress scope per namespace
# ============================================================
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sidecar
  namespace: payment-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: payment-service
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/api.stripe.com"
        - "istio-system/*"
      port:
        number: 443
        protocol: HTTPS
        name: https-external
    - hosts:
        - "./*"
        - "istio-system/*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sidecar
  namespace: notification-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: notification-service
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/api.sendgrid.com"
        - "./*"
        - "istio-system/*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: order-service-sidecar
  namespace: order-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: order-service
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com"
        - "istio-system/redis-primary.abc123.ng.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com"
        - "./*"
        - "istio-system/*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: reporting-service-sidecar
  namespace: reporting-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: reporting-service
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com"
        - "istio-system/my-deployment.es.us-east-1.aws.found.io"
        - "./*"
        - "istio-system/*"
---
# ============================================================
# AuthorizationPolicy to restrict egress per workload
# ============================================================
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: egress-allow-payment-to-stripe
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: egressgateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - payment-service
              - checkout-service
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - api.stripe.com
            ports:
              - "443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: egress-allow-notification-to-sendgrid
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: egressgateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - notification-service
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - api.sendgrid.com
            ports:
              - "443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: egress-allow-db-access
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: egressgateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - order-service
              - inventory-service
              - user-service
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            ports:
              - "5432"
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - reporting-service
              - analytics-service
      to:
        - operation:
            hosts:
              - readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            ports:
              - "5432"
---
# ============================================================
# EnvoyFilter for custom headers and rate limiting on egress
# ============================================================
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: egress-custom-headers
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      istio: egressgateway
  configPatches:
    - applyTo: CLUSTER
      match:
        context: GATEWAY
        cluster:
          service: api.stripe.com
      patch:
        operation: MERGE
        value:
          connect_timeout: 5s
          dns_refresh_rate: 300s
          dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
          respect_dns_ttl: true
    - applyTo: CLUSTER
      match:
        context: GATEWAY
        cluster:
          service: api.sendgrid.com
      patch:
        operation: MERGE
        value:
          connect_timeout: 5s
          dns_refresh_rate: 300s
          dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
          respect_dns_ttl: true
    - applyTo: CLUSTER
      match:
        context: GATEWAY
        cluster:
          service: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
      patch:
        operation: MERGE
        value:
          connect_timeout: 10s
          dns_refresh_rate: 60s
          dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
          respect_dns_ttl: true
